name: ui_inspect_wpf
desc: Read a property from an open WPF tool window. 'window' is a substring of the window type name (e.g. DrawingExporter). Optional 'element' is x:Name. 'property' is a dot chain (e.g. IsChecked, SelectedIndex, Items.Count). Leave property empty to get the target type name.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: Substring of Window class name, e.g. DrawingExporter, ParameterEditor

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: Optional x:Name of a descendant element

parameters.name: property
parameters.description: Property path (e.g. IsChecked, MainTabs.SelectedIndex). Omit for type name.
